---
title: "The Blossoms of Morality, intended for the Amusement & Instruction of Young Ladies and Gentlemen"
---

## The Blossoms of Morality, intended for the Amusement & Instruction of Young Ladies and Gentlemen
**Date:** 1789
**Imprint:** London: Newbery

### Notes

The second edition had illustrations by John Bewick, brother of the famous engraver Thomas Bewick.  The story was Included by CMY in the second <i>[[cmybook:96]Storehouse of Stories]</i>.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
